title: astragalus orthorhynchus
intro: Astragalus orthorhynchus, also known as the Chinese milkvetch, is a type of perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus orthorhynchus include enhanced immune function, improved cardiovascular health, and increased endurance, making it a popular herbal remedy among athletes and individuals with compromised immune systems. Astragalus orthorhynchus can be prepared into various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, tinctures, and teas, allowing for different modes of administration to suit individual needs.
